mapper.select: select id from p_project where id = #{id}
select id, company_id, title, logo, score, sub_count, comm_count, good_count, business, addr, introduction, detail, create_time from p_project where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into p_project (id, company_id, title, logo, score, sub_count, comm_count, good_count, business, addr, introduction, detail, create_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{score,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{subCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{commCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{goodCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{business,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{introduction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update p_project set sub_count = sub_count - 1 where id = #{id} and sub_count > 0

update p_project
company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logo = #{logo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
score = #{score,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
sub_count = #{subCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
comm_count = #{commCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
good_count = #{goodCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
business = #{business,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addr = #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
introduction = #{introduction,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
detail = #{detail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update p_project set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logo = #{logo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, score = #{score,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, sub_count = #{subCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, comm_count = #{commCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, good_count = #{goodCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, business = #{business,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addr = #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, introduction = #{introduction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detail = #{detail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
